design_elements: contrast between matte cotton hood and glossy satin body
consensus.fabric: satin shell with ribbed knit trim and cotton jersey hood
consensus.overall_description: A black satin hooded bomber jacket featuring a silver/white embroidered rose bouquet on the left chest, snap-button front closure, attached drawstring hood in matte cotton, and ribbed knit trim at the cuffs and waistband.
patches: small brand label/patch visible at inner collar area, appears multicolored
consensus.stitching_details: standard seam construction, ribbed knit banding at cuffs and hem
